user.title: Engine Moisture Monitor
user.description: Point the monitor at your cowl temperature/humidity sensors and home field. Everything else is tunable later in Configure.

data.scripts_dir: Path to repo scripts/ (leave blank to auto-detect)

init.title: Engine Moisture Monitor settings
init.description: Schedule, model parameters, and alert thresholds. Changes reload the integration.

data.gapfill_enabled: Gap-fill from airport station when the cowl sensor is stale
data.transfer_params_path: Gap-fill: station→cowl transfer fit JSON (blank = repo data/<icao>_cowl_transfer.json)
data.window_prompt: LLM flying-window prompt (blank = built-in; {icao} is substituted)

run_now.name: Run now
run_now.description: Run one moisture-model cycle immediately, optionally forcing the notification.

force.name: Force notification
force.description: Send the nudge even if thresholds/quiet-hours/cooldown would suppress it.

chart_history_days.name: Chart lookback (days)
chart_history_days.description: Override the alert chart's history window for this run only. Leave blank to use the configured option.
